FM5_LLM_VAGUENESS.label: LLM Vagueness
FM5_LLM_VAGUENESS.root_cause: Long context dilution; model hedges on specific figures
FM5_LLM_VAGUENESS.fix: Structured output prompts; force extraction of numeric targets; chain-of-thought
